codeReview.summary: The task_board module implementation is comprehensive and covers all three requirements: task state persistence, agent assignment tracking, and time/cost accounting. All 18 unit tests pass.

issues.description: In `update_state`, when handling Paused state, elapsed time accumulation uses an approximation of 60 seconds per pause (`entry.pause_count as i64 * 60`) rather than tracking actual pause duration. This is acknowledged in a comment but could lead to imprecise elapsed time tracking.

summary: Feature orch-task-board PASSES review. The TaskBoard module in crates/swell-orchestrator/src/task_board.rs provides: (1) Task state persistence via TaskBoardEntry.state field with proper transitions in update_state(), (2) Agent assignment via assigned_agent field and assign_agent() method, (3) Time tracking via started_at, completed_at, elapsed_secs with pause accounting, (4) Token cost tracking via tokens_used, estimated_cost_usd with CostModel supporting configurable input/output costs per million tokens and per-model cost breakdowns. All 18 unit tests pass. One minor non-blocking issue: pause time uses 60-second approximation rather than actual duration.
